ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth for user demographic analysis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for user demographic analysis */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for personalized content */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone for time-sensitive features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users following */,
  "posts_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts made by the user */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments made by the user */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total views on the user's content */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the profile is verified */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the profile */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone for the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who created the content */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Usernode, Post, Comment) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body or text of the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., published, draft, deleted) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views on the content */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the content */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the content */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility setting (e.g., public, private, unlisted) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone for the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES content_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who engaged with the content */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., read, like, comment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* A value associated with the engagement (e.g., 1 for like, 0 for read) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when engaging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content in this version */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body or text of the content in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who created the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* JSON object describing the changes made in this version */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-tag association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content ID */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was associated with the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object defining the permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who performed the moderation action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., approve, reject, delete) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the moderator's user ID */,
  "moderator_role" TEXT /* Role of the moderator (e.g., moderator, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object defining the user's preferences */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preferences were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preferences were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
